## Global Rules

The following project-specific context extends those rules.

## Stack

```
Framework:       [Next.js / Tauri / Express / etc.]
Language:        [TypeScript / Python / Rust / etc.]
Styling:         [Tailwind + shadcn/ui + Framer Motion]
Backend:         [Next.js API routes / FastAPI / etc.]
Database:        [Supabase / SQLite / PlanetScale / etc.]
Auth:            [Clerk / Supabase / NextAuth / etc.]
Deploy:          [Vercel / Tauri build / Railway / etc.]
Package manager: [npm / pnpm / pip]
Test runner:     [Vitest / Jest / pytest / Playwright]
Key integrations:[Plaid / Stripe / Whisper / etc.]
```
